case_title: MAYERS, STEVE VS SCHWAB, CHARLES ATT/CHAIRMAN DIVISION

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS SUBMITTED TO SUE KAPLAN FOR APPROVAL. PLTF IS REQUESTING AN AMERICAN SIGN LANGUAGE INTERPRETER.
CERTIFIED MAIL TO CHARLES SCHWAB RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $225.00 FILED BY MAYERS, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHWAB, CHARLES ATT/CHAIRMAN DIVISION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SPOKE TO JULIE ABUSHARKH, INTERPRETER COORDINATOR, AND CONFIRMED ARRANGEMENT OF SIGN LANGUAGE INTERPRETER FOR HEARING.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHWAB, CHARLES ATT/CHAIRMAN DIVISION PER PLTF'S REQUEST. SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS: DENIED. APPLICANT'S INCOME EXCEEDS EXPENSES. APPLICANT HAS SUFFICIENT ASSETS FOR INTERPRETER.
